description: Object group definitions for random object placement.

GroupName.description: Internal name of the object group (reference only). Not read by 1.13c engine

Offset.description: Group ID used in levels.txt ObjGrp0-7 columns. Not read by 1.13c engine

ID0.description: Object ID from objects.txt for slot 0. Not read by 1.13c engine

DENSITY0.description: Minimum cells between spawned instances of object 0. Not read by 1.13c engine

PROB0.description: Spawn probability for object 0 (0-100). Not read by 1.13c engine

ID1.description: Object ID from objects.txt for slot 1. Not read by 1.13c engine

DENSITY1.description: Minimum cells between spawned instances of object 1. Not read by 1.13c engine

PROB1.description: Spawn probability for object 1 (0-100). Not read by 1.13c engine

ID2.description: Object ID from objects.txt for slot 2. Not read by 1.13c engine

DENSITY2.description: Minimum cells between spawned instances of object 2. Not read by 1.13c engine

PROB2.description: Spawn probability for object 2 (0-100). Not read by 1.13c engine

ID3.description: Object ID from objects.txt for slot 3. Not read by 1.13c engine

DENSITY3.description: Minimum cells between spawned instances of object 3. Not read by 1.13c engine

PROB3.description: Spawn probability for object 3 (0-100). Not read by 1.13c engine

ID4.description: Object ID from objects.txt for slot 4. Not read by 1.13c engine

DENSITY4.description: Minimum cells between spawned instances of object 4. Not read by 1.13c engine

PROB4.description: Spawn probability for object 4 (0-100). Not read by 1.13c engine

ID5.description: Object ID from objects.txt for slot 5. Not read by 1.13c engine

DENSITY5.description: Minimum cells between spawned instances of object 5. Not read by 1.13c engine

PROB5.description: Spawn probability for object 5 (0-100). Not read by 1.13c engine

ID6.description: Object ID from objects.txt for slot 6. Not read by 1.13c engine

DENSITY6.description: Minimum cells between spawned instances of object 6. Not read by 1.13c engine

PROB6.description: Spawn probability for object 6 (0-100). Not read by 1.13c engine

ID7.description: Object ID from objects.txt for slot 7. Not read by 1.13c engine

DENSITY7.description: Minimum cells between spawned instances of object 7. Not read by 1.13c engine

PROB7.description: Spawn probability for object 7 (0-100). Not read by 1.13c engine

SHRINES.description: Whether this group contains shrines. Not read by 1.13c engine

WELLS.description: Whether this group contains wells. Not read by 1.13c engine
